---
title: 'Tue 08/11/15'
date: '2015-08-11T11:45:00.0040000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4891872733124245902'
blogger_filename: '/2015/08/tue-081115.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

Up early... heading out to meet Allen.<br />
<br />
<br />
